description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 22 cm Width: 42 cm Depth: 12 cm Made of blended fabric with synthetic overlays for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with one inner zipped compartment and an organiser pouch for essentials Two short synthetic leather handles woven through metallic buckles for carrying ease and style Buckle design with metallic studs on the sides for style Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge embossed on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
